payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_a154d2d24828466b84dc3c07', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import re\\n\\ndef calculate(expression):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Parse and evaluate a simple math expression string.\\"\\"\\"\\n    match = re.match(r\'(\\\\d+)\\\\s*([+\\\\-*/])\\\\s*(\\\\d+)\', expression)\\n    if not match:\\n        raise ValueError(\\"Invalid expression\\")\\n    \\n    num1, op, num2 = int(match.group(1)), match.group(2), int(match.group(3))\\n    \\n    operations = {\\n        \'+\': lambda a, b: a + b,\\n        \'-\': lambda a, b: a - b,\\n        \'*\': lambda a, b: a * b,\\n        \'/\': lambda a, b: a / b,\\n    }\\n    \\n    if op not in operations:\\n        raise ValueError(f\\"Unsupported operator: {op}\\")\\n    \\n    return operations[op](num1, num2)\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\"__main__\\":\\n    # Quick test\\n    test_cases = [\\"10 + 5\\", \\"20 * 3\\", \\"100 / 4\\", \\"15 - 7\\"]\\n    for expr in test_cases:\\n        print(f\\"{expr} = {calculate(expr)}\\")", "filename": "calculator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
